title: tridax angustifolia var. stuebelii
intro: Tridax angustifolia var. stuebelii, also known as the narrow-leaved tridax or Stuebel's tridax, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tridax angustifolia var. stuebelii include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
